items.name_en: 👑 Chanel 23P New Handle Series WOC Release, fell in love at first sight💕 Imported oil-waxed top-layer cowhide, smooth and delicate texture. First is the comfortable feel, super good☑️ The appearance needs no saying, just buy it blindly and you won't go wrong. It is also versatile, achieving the effects of single shoulder, crossbody, underarm, and handbag 📷 Simply a blessing〰️ Very exquisite, worth collecting 🔝 Dimensions: 19x12cm, Colors: Black/White/Green/Silver, Model: 1135

items.name_en: 👑👑Original✨💞💞Kelly Brief Bag M44919 is in stock👏Classic pattern fan-shaped buckle Kelly bag. Kelly bags are always popular in the fashion world. International influencers, fashion bloggers, and celebrities all walk the line between the latest fashion releases and retro classics. With slight modifications, it perfectly interprets the ultimate. Features an adjustable strap, can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.

items.name_en: 👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
items.name_cn:
👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
🌟Beechwood handle + unique silhouette = unforgettable
🌟Cotton-linen fabric and leather patchwork + yellow calfskin lining = exquisite from the inside out.
🌟Perfect strap length, only 250g! Light enough to make you doubt if it's a bag. This is the unique charm of MiniSaigon.
🌟Suitable for any style and occasion, no need to worry about matching. Absolutely stunning.
🌟All the beautiful colors are shared here. A safe bet, no wrong choices.
 Dimensions 21*14.5*9.5CM
Model 8005

items.name_en: 👑Original, Model: M46740 Monogram Mini Twisted. The Monogram canvas Saumur BB handbag reinterprets a beloved archival design in a modern style. The saddle bag shape and natural cowhide strap buckle evoke a equestrian spirit, but the front buckle hides a magnetic closure: convenient and modern. This small bag has space to store a day's essentials and is versatile due to the detachable shoulder strap and handle. Size: 20x15x7.5cm
items.name_cn: 👑Original, Model: M46740 Monogram Mini Twisted. The Monogram canvas Saumur BB handbag reinterprets a beloved archival design in a modern style. The saddle bag shape and natural cowhide strap buckle evoke a equestrian spirit, but the front buckle hides a magnetic closure: convenient and modern. This small bag has space to store a day's essentials and is versatile due to the detachable shoulder strap and handle. Size: 20x15x7.5cm

items.name_en: 💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
items.name_cn:
💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
Main: Calfskin Lining: Calfskin
Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁

specs.rawTitle:

Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁
